pi_items.source: Explicitly defined in the task description and verified in setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and verifier.py.

privileged_info_summary: The task involves interacting with live public internet domains (check.torproject.org, www.torproject.org, eff.org) using Tor Browser. The expected output file path is explicitly set to /home/ga/Documents/tor_compatibility_report.txt in the task instructions and scoring scripts.
